scenarioAuthority: The analyst-owned spec.md User Scenarios define SCN-106-001 through SCN-106-022. SCN-106-016 through SCN-106-022 were added by the 2026-07-24 analyst spec revision and were mapped to existing scopes and already-planned tests during the 2026-07-24 planning reconciliation; no new test file was invented.

reconciliation.note: Added SCN-106-016..022 coverage rows to align the manifest with the 05:46 spec revision (22 analyst scenarios). Each new row references an already-planned test; linkedTests stay empty and every plannedTest keeps status not-yet-authored.

plannedTests.plannedTestId: UX-E2E-106-001 one login reaches Assistant and representative legacy PWA and Card routes

scenarios.title: Cookie mutations enforce CSRF and Origin

plannedTests.plannedTestId: shadow adapters preserve native Search HTMX read mutation Digest Assistant Wiki Card PRG PWA auth logout and service-worker contracts

scenarios.reconciledNote: CSRF/Origin 403-before-mutation enforcement is owned by BUG-070-001 MutationTrustGuard; spec 106 consumes it and proves shell mutation families (HTMX, Card PRG, PWA auth, logout/replay) bind to it via the SCOPE-106-04 cross-family canary.

scenarios.title: Lists are a complete browser journey

plannedTests.plannedTestId: UX-E2E-106-037 Lists composes only from proven routes and round-trips owner lifecycle without guilt counters

plannedTests.plannedTestId: UX-E2E-106-038 Meals composes owner plan recipe shopping and calendar outcomes without drag dependence

scenarios.title: Expenses are a complete browser journey

scenarios.title: Acceptance readiness and presentation flow one way

plannedTests.plannedTestId: UX-E2E-106-071 Admin Acceptance distinguishes accepted degraded failed blocked timeout mismatch and missing identity states

scenarios.reconciledNote: One-way flow: BUG-102-001 produces immutable acceptance evidence, BUG-032-004 derives readiness, spec 106 renders it; SCOPE-106-15 consumes the derived projections without producing or approving them.

scenarios.title: Blank search performs no domain work

plannedTests.plannedTestId: UX-E2E-106-027 whitespace Search focuses linked validation and sends no request

scenarios.title: Global private content follows grants not row ownership

plannedTests.plannedTestId: UX-E2E-106-052 Admin is omitted for ordinary users and complete but redacted for authorized operators

scenarios.reconciledNote: Grant-based projection visibility over one operator-owned global corpus; ungranted identities receive no content or existence metadata and no row-isolation/tenant claim is made. SCOPE-106-03 privacy-clear foundation broadens this per FR-106-038.
